author: seekerPrice
name: MLX Tuned Hyperparameters (Local-only, H100 Pending)
note: Local MLX result only at 40M training tokens (5000 steps × 8K batch). NOT a competition submission - documenting hyperparameter ablation results. H100 validation pending compute credit approval.
technique_summary: Depth recurrence L3,4,5 + parallel residuals L7+ + TUNED hyperparameters (Muon 0.95, QK-Gain 4.0, Matrix LR 0.02). Shows -0.05 BPB improvement over SOTA-default hyperparameters at same model/training config.

attribution.methodology: A/B comparison at 5000-step MLX scale to isolate hyperparameter effect
